title: Clean Product Studio Shot
description: Turn a product reference into a polished studio-style hero image with controlled lighting and a clear commercial focal point.
prompt: Create a premium studio product photograph of {{product}}. Preserve the product identity and proportions. Use {{background}} as the environment, {{lighting}} lighting, realistic materials, deliberate composition, and enough negative space for campaign copy. Avoid extra logos, text, duplicate objects, malformed geometry, and visual clutter.

title: Cinematic Launch Reel
description: A short-form launch structure for turning one product or creative idea into a visually coherent vertical reel.
prompt: Build a 15-30 second vertical launch reel for {{subject}} aimed at {{audience}}. Open with a visual interruption in the first second, reveal the subject through 3-5 distinct shots, keep one coherent visual language, use motion that supports the subject rather than distracts from it, and end on a clear final image or action. Tone: {{tone}}. Platform: {{platform}}.

title: UGC Problem → Proof → Offer
description: A creator-first UGC ad recipe that starts with a real problem, demonstrates believable proof, and closes with one concrete action.
prompt: Create a natural UGC script for {{product}}. Start with a specific lived problem the audience recognizes. Show or describe the product in use, include one believable proof point, remove polished corporate language, and end with one simple action. Audience: {{audience}}. Voice: {{voice}}. Keep it conversational and filmable by one creator with a phone.

title: Brand World Moodboard
description: Translate a brand idea into a coherent visual world before generating final campaign assets.
prompt: Create a visual moodboard for {{brand}} built around {{idea}}. Define a coherent world through color, material, typography direction, photography style, lighting, environment, cultural references, and composition. Avoid generic startup imagery. The board should feel specific enough to guide a photographer, designer, or image model consistently.

title: 60-Second Story Script
description: A compact story structure for creators who need a clear beginning, tension, turn, and payoff without filler.
prompt: Write a spoken script under 60 seconds about {{topic}} for {{audience}}. Begin inside a concrete moment rather than with an introduction. Establish tension quickly, introduce one meaningful turn or discovery, and end with a payoff that changes how the opening is understood. Voice: {{voice}}. Remove filler, generic motivation, and unnecessary setup.

title: One Idea → Launch Pack
description: Turn one idea into a coordinated mini-launch: visual direction, hero asset, reel concept, caption, and reusable agent pack.
prompt: Transform {{idea}} into a compact launch pack for {{audience}}. Produce: 1) one-sentence positioning, 2) visual direction, 3) hero image recipe, 4) short-form video concept, 5) launch caption, and 6) an ICM handoff manifest that preserves creator context separately from run-specific outputs. Keep every artifact consistent with {{brand_voice}}.
